'''Ebbak''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who was a civilian employee in the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] military. After observing her skill at data analysis, [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] asked her to leave her position on board the [[Anakin Solo (starship)|''Anakin Solo'']] to serve as his personal assistant. She was short, unremarkable of appearance and dutiful.

{{Char-stub}}
